scene_modules.description: A brief introduction video showcasing the concept of TraderFrame and its mission to transform fragmented market evidence into transparent, risk-aware decisions.
An interactive 3D model demonstrating how traders can filter market evidence based on various criteria such as time frame, source reliability, and historical performance.
An interactive quiz where users can challenge and approve pieces of evidence. The system provides feedback on the validity and relevance of each piece of evidence.
A textual explanation detailing how transparent reasoning is used to evaluate market evidence, ensuring that decisions are based on credible sources and well-considered factors.
A risk-aware dashboard displaying real-time market data, potential risks, and recommended actions based on the filtered evidence.
A user control panel allowing traders to customize their experience, set preferences, and manage their access rights.
